issue_summary: Credible signals indicate an active or very recent AWS multi-service operational issue. Independent monitoring shows AWS reporting issues, and public user reports mention 500 responses or empty JSON from AWS-hosted APIs.
impact: Potential degradation across AWS-hosted apps, APIs, and dependent MSP tooling or customer services.
response_1: Check customer-facing AWS workloads, integrations, and automation for elevated errors, latency, or failed jobs before escalating internally.
response_2: Pause nonessential changes and watch AWS Health plus your own telemetry; prepare client comms if tenant-facing impact is confirmed.
